profile: Software engineer with 3+ years of production experience building and owning systems end-to-end — from architecture to deployment. Currently completing an MSc in Computer Science at the University of Lincoln (Distinction). Integrates AI tools (Cursor, GitHub Copilot) deeply into the development workflow to move faster without sacrificing correctness. Comfortable across diverse stacks: React, Angular, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Docker, Azure CI/CD. Driven by simplicity: questions every layer of complexity and holds work to a rising standard.

responsibilities: Integrated AI-assisted development tools (Cursor, GitHub Copilot) into the full team workflow — spec parsing, code generation, debugging — reducing average feature implementation time by ~25% while maintaining correctness and reliability standards.
Increased test coverage by 30% using Jest and Vitest, reducing production regressions by 15% across core modules — demonstrating end-to-end ownership of quality.
Contributed to a micro-frontend architecture that enabled independent deployments, modular development, and faster delivery across teams — simplifying a complex monolithic frontend.
Collaborated with backend engineers and BA teams to design scalable API flows, reducing integration issues through clear interface contracts.
Developed cross-platform features using React Native and implemented internationalisation via React-i18next, expanding product accessibility across multiple markets.
Built and maintained a production banking platform used by external partner banks — owning components from design through deployment in a high-reliability environment.
Developed reusable, scalable React components for dashboards, forms, and real-time financial data visualisation, with a focus on simplicity and maintainability.
Integrated frontend applications with RESTful APIs, collaborating closely with backend teams to ensure data integrity and performance.
Consistently prioritised cross-browser compatibility, performance, and usability in a live production codebase.

personal_projects.name: L.I.V.E
personal_projects.subtitle: Learn. Improve. Visualise. Empower
personal_projects.description: Full-stack web application for gamified diabetes education — MSc Computer Science project, University of Lincoln. Sole owner from idea to production.
responsibilities: Took full end-to-end ownership: designed architecture, built the frontend (React/Vite) and backend (FastAPI/PostgreSQL), and deployed to Microsoft Azure — no handoffs.
Automated the entire build and deployment pipeline using Docker and Azure CI/CD, enabling reliable, repeatable deployments from day one.
Implemented secure authentication, guest access, and usage analytics — keeping the system simple and purposeful rather than over-engineered.
Delivered a polished, tested product on schedule, demonstrating the ability to operate with startup-level agility on an individual project.
